A Man Called Otto (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $64,267,657Details
International Box Office $44,373,491
Worldwide Box Office $108,641,148
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,627,398
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,474,422
Total $6,101,820
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Otto Anderson is a grumpy widower whose only joy comes from criticizing and judging his exasperated neighbors. When a lively young family moves in next door, he meets his match in quick-witted and very pregnant Marisol, leading to an unexpected friendship that will turn his world upside-down.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,202,386 (6.5% of total gross)
Legs:5.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:637 opening theaters/3,957 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $70,261,376

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 30th, 2022 (Oscar Qualifying Run) by Sony Pictures
January 6th, 2023 (Limited) by Sony Pictures
January 13th, 2023 (Expands Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: December 25th, 2022 (Wide), released as Un Vecino Gruñón (Mexico)
December 28th, 2022 (Wide), released as El Peor Vecino del Mundo (Spain)
December 29th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
January 1st, 2023 (Wide) (New Zealand)
January 5th, 2023 (Wide), released as Muž menom Otto (Slovakia)
Video Release: February 21st, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic material involving suicide attempts, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2759 (cert #54066), 11/23/2022)
Running Time: 126 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Pennsylvania, United States

Subgenre: Comedy Drama

Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States, Sweden
Languages: English

Synopsis

Otto Anderson is a grumpy widower whose only joy comes from criticizing and judging his exasperated neighbors. When a lively young family moves in next door, he meets his match in quick-witted and very pregnant Marisol, leading to an unexpected friendship that will turn his world upside-down.
